nodes.label: main.py — Phase 1.5: The Executive Agent Features:   - Dynamic Identity: reads I
Returns True if OLLAMA_INTEL_GPU is set to 1 in the environment.
Reads Identity.md from the Obsidian vault asynchronously.     Returns the file c
Async startup: sync identity then build system prompt.
Replaces the system message in-place with the current mode's prompt.
Simple sliding window — keeps system prompt + last WINDOW_SIZE messages.
Fire-and-forget: categorise + write to memory + update cache.
Continuous Voice-to-Voice loop. Listen -> Think -> Speak -> Repeat.
Prints response time and GPU status.
# NOTE: Optimized for 16GB RAM + Intel Iris Xe.
Quick smoke test for the full RAG + Reflexion pipeline.
brain/memory_manager.py — Graph Cleanup Edition Removes all date-based wiki-link
Saves a conversation snippet as a quick-access fact. Zero GPU, instant.
Retrieves relevant facts by keyword matching. Returns top 5 matches.
brain/semantic_matcher.py Lightweight semantic similarity engine for Aether. Use
Lazy-load the sentence transformer model to avoid slow startup.
Finds the best matching skill for a given user query using cosine similarity.
brain/summarizer.py Hierarchical RAG assistant.  Summarizes Memory_Log.md into W
Distills the conversation log into a condensed insight note.
Listens for a fixed duration and returns text.
Logs a mistake to the Mistakes.md file to avoid repeating it in the future.
Returns disk usage information for the C: drive.
Opens a specified URL in the default web browser.
Saves a new skill mapping. Handled by MemoryManager in main.py.
Searches for an app in the Windows Start Menu and opens it.
Searches YouTube using built-in urllib and returns the first video URL.
Generates and plays audio for the given text.
